publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Photographic prints, negatives, digital files, books, magazines, and other ephemera created or collected by Ernie Paniccioli representing the complete body of his work as an artist and photographer.

dao.xlink:title: Paniccioli scans of posters, awards, book covers

daodesc.p: Paniccioli scans of posters, awards, book covers

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Photographic prints, negatives, digital files, books, magazines, and other ephemera created or collected by Ernie Paniccioli representing the complete body of his work as an artist and photographer from the 1960s to the present, including his work as a primary staff photographer for Word Up magazine. The archive includes ca. 35 cubic ft. of material comprised of more than 100,000 images in physical and digital form.

emph.ref: Series I. Magazine Clippings and Covers

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Ernie Paniccioli archive, #8079. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the curator.

did.unittitle: Series I. Magazine Clippings and Covers
Ernie Paniccioli folders with Paniccioli articles
Flyers and photos in binder, loose material
Box of VIP passes and name tags
Large rolled posters and oversized clippings
Brooklyn Museum: Roots Rhymes and Rage exhibit
Graf and Punk slides and negatives binder
Jingle Bell Ball: New Kids, Celine Dion, Aerosmith, Fiona Apple, Tom Petty, Jakob Dylan, Savage Garden, Sarah McLachlan, Backstreet Boys
Miscellaneous loose slides, slides in sleeves
Miscellaneous I-L, Best of the Best
Miscellaneous Q-Z, Best of the Best
Miscellaneous Best of the Best binder
We'll always miss you big poppa
Photographs with negatives in two boxes
Binder of black and white photographs
Unlabelled black photo album, various artists
Unlabelled binder, black and white photos
